        public java.lang.Object visitDecls(KeYParser.DeclsContext ctx)
        Description copied from class: KeYParserBaseVisitor
        Visit a parse tree produced by KeYParser.decls().

        The default implementation returns the result of calling AbstractParseTreeVisitor.visitChildren(org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.RuleNode) on ctx.

        Throws a semanticError for the given ast node and message.
        Parameters:
        ctx -
        format -
        args -

      • throwEx

        protected void throwEx(java.lang.Throwable e)
        Wraps an exception into a BuildingException
        Parameters:
        e -
